name: EChartsSankeyStyling
description: Sankey Chart v1.0.5 – fixed linked analysis, label wrapping, palette selector

colorPalette.description: Color palette name for node auto-coloring. Options: Default, Ocean, Sunset, Forest, Corporate, Pastel

onSelect.description: Called when the user clicks a node or flow line on the Sankey chart.

getDataSource.description: Returns the data source bound to the widget.

addDimension.description: Adds a dimension to the specified feed. feed: 'dimensions'. Example: addDimension('BookingCountry', 'dimensions')

parameters.name: dimensionId
parameters.description: Technical ID of the dimension to add

removeDimension.description: Removes a dimension from the specified feed. Example: removeDimension('BookingCountry', 'dimensions')

parameters.name: dimensionId
parameters.description: Technical ID of the dimension to remove

addMember.description: Adds a measure or member to the specified feed. Example: addMember('measures', 'Amount')

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Technical ID of the measure/member to add

removeMember.description: Removes a measure or member from the specified feed. Example: removeMember('measures', 'Amount')

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Technical ID of the measure/member to remove

getSelections.description: Returns the last clicked node or edge as an object with dataType, name/source/target fields. Returns null if nothing clicked.

sortByValue.description: Sorts Sankey flows by amount value. sortOrder: 'ascending' | 'descending'. Example: sortByValue('descending')

removeSorting.description: Clears the active sort and restores original data order.

rankBy.description: Filters to show only the top or bottom N flows by value. Example: rankBy(5, 'top')

removeRanking.description: Clears the Top N filter and shows all flows again.

setEnabled.description: Enables or disables all click and hover interactions on the chart. Example: setEnabled(false)

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable, false to disable

isEnabled.description: Returns whether user interactions are currently enabled.

setContextMenuVisible.description: Shows or hides the right-click context menu (sort/rank options). Example: setContextMenuVisible(true)

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

stylingSetting.description: Styling settings for a depth level

feeds.description: Dimensions – add SOURCE dimension first (e.g. Client Domicile Country), then TARGET dimension (e.g. Booking Country).
